programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. Mum-of-three Geraldine is overwhelmed by a sea of clutter in her three-bedroom house

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A murder suspect is pursued and trapped in Bradford by a task force of traffic cops and officers from a homicide unit. Meanwhile, another squadron of cars is deployed to catch a speeding car-theft suspect, whose risk-taking only ends when he hits a tree. Across the county, the cops are forced to intervene when a drink-driver is attacked by residents who want revenge for the damage he has done to their parked cars. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers stop a 16-year-old car thief in the early hours before he does any major damage, while a high-speed car and foot chase through the centre of Bradford ends in a gruesome smash. A young woman risks driving while drunk, but is saved by her black box, while another young speeder writes his car off in a spectacular fireball and emerges with a broken back. In Leeds, cops pursue a car obeying all the rules of the road - except the one requiring it to stop for the police

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Jon is forced to wrestle with a drunk man on the high street in Lincoln and Dan has an early morning encounter with a driver who is over the limit. Elsewhere, a wine-loving shoplifter gets his just desserts, Mark pulls over a juggernaut in jeopardy on the A1, and the helicopter is scrambled to chase down a car thief

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A violent man gives officers the runaround after wreaking havoc in a hospital, a Macedonian truck driver has a bad day and a fuel thief is caught red-handed. Meanwhile, two Audi S3s are put through their paces by the team and the Operational Support Unit goes back to the classroom for a course about dealing with riots

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Sergeant Baxter strikes it lucky when a routine check on a car uncovers a case of suspected drug dealing, and things turn nasty when three men are arrested on suspicion of theft. Elsewhere, Jon Peacock brings in two prisoners, a petrol thief's stealing spree comes to a halt after a high-speed pursuit, and Jules and Jezz come to the aid of an abandoned dog in a ditch

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall arrives in Leeds, where English bulldog Wilson's destructive behaviour is making his owner so distraught that she is considering having him rehomed. Realising that this bolshie bulldog's behaviour is all for attention, Graeme sets about turning it around and to restore harmony to the home. Later, in Northampton, Graeme encounters Pomeranians Bella and Lola, who are attacking anything coming through the door

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell

The parking enforcers of Weston-super-Mare are under pressure as 100,000 visitors descend on this popular seaside town on bank holiday Monday

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday

Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock and Ryan Reynolds

programme.desc: The team tries to prevent a miscarriage of justice after a young model is raped by a renowned fashion photographer, who looks to his successful brother to make the charges disappear. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A contestant on a reality dating show claims to have been raped. Co-operating with the SVU, the programme's producers agree to let Benson and her team go undercover on the set for an incognito investigation. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: An activist fighting for the rights of the Tamil people survives an assassination attempt at JFK airport, but it soon becomes clear that members of her close circle have also been targeted. Logan and Wheeler are soon on the case - and the investigation puts them on the trail of an unlikely Canadian gun-for-hire as they race to catch the would-be killer. Starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson

programme.title: Grimm

Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: Documentary following Britain's emergency helicopter medical services. The pressure is on as teams race to the scene of a traffic accident in rural Oxfordshire where a family car has left the country road and plummeted 30ft into a ravine. Concern also grows for a jockey who has fallen off her horse and suffered an open leg fracture that requires a dose of painkillers three times the amount that would normally be administered to an injured British solider. Finally, the search is on for a lost paraglider - yielding surprising results

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues

programme.title: Frontline Police
programme.desc: Rav Wilding joins officers on a pursuit through the streets of Southend, Essex, and at a suspected drug dealer's flat, where a thorough search is required. Elsewhere, a deaf man reports that his home has been burgled, and a shift in an unmarked car identifies various offenders, including a driver without the correct licence, others using mobile phones while on the move and a motorist whose keys were confiscated by a road worker who believed him to be drunk

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Documentary using dramatic reconstructions to examine some of Britain's most notorious murders, charting the last few days leading up to the killings from the perspectives of both the perpetrators and the victims. The first edition focuses on Jane Andrews, a former dresser to the Duchess of York, who bludgeoned and stabbed to death her millionaire boyfriend Thomas Cressman in an act of revenge after he told her that he would never propose

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer

programme.title: Fairy Tales for You
programme.desc: An animated version of The Gingerbread Man read by Rik Mayall

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Akka's flock has just come through a storm and landed in a beautiful nature reserve that has every comfort

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: As the geese are relaxing in a charming place that Akka found, Nils goes fishing

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Chris Hollins and Gaby Roslin find out exactly what's in chicken nuggets, comparing the shop-bought variety with home-made ones, and Matt Allwright reports on the single biggest problem facing the poultry industry - campylobacter, a bacteria and common cause of food poisoning that can be deadly. Chris gets a lesson in the best way to clean and cook herbs from Michelin-starred chef Atul Kochhar, and Coventry food safety officer Nicki inspects a takeaway, where she is horrified to come across the worst infestation of cockroaches she has ever seen

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Adrian Edmondson returns to his birthplace of Yorkshire to document a summer in the life of the Dales, meeting the people who live there all year round. Sixteen-year-old Phillip Mellin talks about running his family's farm alongside his mother, following the death of his father last year, while vet Neil Roberts is called out to an emergency calving

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright and Chris Hollins return to follow the work of more food inspectors as they protect the public from unhygienic restaurants and potentially harmful foodstuffs. A Chinese takeaway in Enfield, London, is shut down temporarily after mouse droppings and urine are discovered on the premises, while Chris finds out how much bacteria is lurking in the kitchen of a Lincolnshire fire station and also meets a Lancashire man who became seriously ill after eating undercooked pork. Matt investigates animal rustling and the effects these countryside crimes could have on the catering industry

programme.title: Man on the Run (1949)
programme.desc: An army deserter finds himself falsely accused of murder when he accidentally stumbles into a pawn shop robbery. Thriller, starring Derek Farr and Joan Hopkins

programme.title: High Treason (1951)
programme.desc: Officers of MI5 and Special branch join forces to deal with a wave of sabotage attacks that have been sweeping the nation. Spy thriller, starring Liam Redmond and Andre Morell

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series presented by Andrew White, featuring inspirational walks between 2-8 miles from around Britain

programme.title: The Fixers
programme.desc: Four passionate builders, in ten remote locations, have one mission: to improve lives. They will do whatever it takes-saving the world, one build at a time

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary is summoned to court to answer drink-driving charges resulting from a binge in 1941. A ban looks likely - as does a visit to a counsellor to help save his ailing marriage. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, Dervla Kirwan and Michelle Holmes

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Notting Hill for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Former student Alan Titchmarsh narrates this series following the work of staff at the botanic gardens. The team prepare for a royal visit, knowing everything has to be in perfect order. The Palm House is in need of an extensive makeover, with Emma Fox working hard to get it finished on time, as Stuart Henchi and the institute's 200 gardeners swarm over the rest of the grounds

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: High winds force the gardens to shut down for the first time in 15 years, putting Tony Kirkham and the tree gardeners on red alert, while Dave Barnes struggles to move a collection of valuable palms into their new quarters. Narrated by Alan Titchmarsh

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: Saturday Church (2017)
programme.desc: Ulysses, a shy, bullied 14-year-old, lives with his mother, Amara, and younger brother. Given the recent passing of his father, Ulysses' Aunt Rose, agrees to help take care of him and his sibling while their mother is at work. He soon stumbles across a vibrant transgender community while trying to find his own identity. Writer/director Damon Cardasis's drama, starring Luka Kain, Regina Taylor and Margot Bingham

programme.title: Pirates of Somalia (2017)
programme.desc: In 2008, rookie journalist Jay Bahadur forms a plan to embed himself among the pirates of Somalia, and provides a rare profile of these men and the forces that drive them. Fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino and Evan Peters

programme.title: Glam Metal Detectives
programme.desc: Comedy sketch show from 1995, following the oddball characters of the rock band, Glam Metal Detective. Starring Gary Beadle and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: News Rewind
programme.desc: A digest of news and events from across London from the past few days.

programme.title: Stone Age
programme.desc: Meet a group of typical suburban nine-year-old kids with friends, foes and families kicking it really old school, in prehistoric times

programme.title: Stone Age

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: It is the mating season, Pretty Wing and Golden Eye only have eyes for ganders and forget about their chores

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: During a flight in snowy country, Nils is getting very hungry. Gorgo offers to share some tasty worms but Nils is almost ill just looking at them

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Diana: A Model Princess
programme.desc: A look at the creation of Princess Diana's fashion style, and the designers and magazine editors who helped her establish it

programme.title: The October Man (1947)
programme.desc: A chemist with suicidal tendencies is falsely accused of murder - and his precarious mental state is further upset by taunts from the real killer. Psychological thriller, adapted from a novel by Eric Ambler, starring John Mills, Joan Greenwood and Joyce Carey

programme.title: Miracle in Soho (1957)
programme.desc: A cynical road-repairer falls for the alluring charms of an Italian girl working as a barmaid, only to discover she and her family are planning to move to Canada. Romantic drama written by Emeric Pressburger, starring John Gregson, Belinda Lee and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: Seven Thunders (1957)
programme.desc: Two British soldiers escape from German prison camps and hide out in a fishing village in occupied France. As they wait for the opportunity to return to England, they attract the attention of a doctor who is also a serial killer preying on fugitives from the Nazis. Second World War drama based on Rupert Croft-Cooke's novel, starring Stephen Boyd and James Robertson Justice

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tour exploring Thamesmead for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Chris Hollins and Gaby Roslin find out exactly what's in chicken nuggets, comparing the shop-bought variety with home-made ones, and Matt Allwright reports on the single biggest problem facing the poultry industry - campylobacter, a bacteria and common cause of food poisoning that can be deadly. Chris gets a lesson in the best way to clean and cook herbs from Michelin-starred chef Atul Kochhar, and Coventry food safety officer Nicki inspects a takeaway, where she is horrified to come across the worst infestation of cockroaches she has ever seen

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Yvonne and Phoebe invite Gary to dinner on the same evening, and although best friend Ron cautions him against trying to keep both dates, his warnings fall on deaf ears. Nicholas Lyndhurst, Michelle Holmes and Dervla Kirwan star

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tour exploring Wapping for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: Part one. Controversy surrounds the appointment of the first female priest at the famous London cathedral

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: Tom and Roy enter a pub quiz, determined to win and prove their minds are still young and agile. Comedy, starring Roger Lloyd Pack, Clive Swift, Jane Asher and Cherie Lunghi

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: A drunk John Hurt arrives in the neighbourhood, while Joe takes advantage of Michael's absence by taking over his house. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Baseline (2010)
programme.desc: A bouncer at an East London grime club saves the life of the local crime boss who owns the establishment. As reward, he is promoted to the position of manager but finds himself plunged into the criminal underworld when he is forced to turn a blind eye to a vast array of illegal activities. Crime thriller, starring Jamie Foreman, Dexter Fletcher, Zoe Tapper, Gordon Alexander, Freddie Connor and Sheraiah Larcher

programme.title: Spivs (2004)
programme.desc: A professional con-man spends his time honing the skills of his protege and making sure his gang of conniving criminals stays out of trouble. However, when a simple heist backfires the ragtag group are left with a lorry-load of illegal immigrants on their hands - and an angry smuggler with revenge on his mind soon adds to their woes. Crime drama, starring Ken Stott,, Nick Moran and Dominic Monaghan

programme.title: Diana: A Model Princess
programme.desc: A look at the creation of Princess Diana's fashion style, and the designers and magazine editors who helped her establish it

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The trainee troopers prepare for their final riding exam over one of the Army's toughest courses. Originally hopeless horseman Glenn is apprehensive - as is Adrian Van Loon, whose kit often fails to meet the rigorous standards. Gunners from the armoured regiment practise on the firing range with live ammunition, and the Household Cavalry's historian talks about their role in the battle of Waterloo

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath.

programme.title: UBOS
programme.desc: Cassy, Vern & Gus are gifted students who go to an enchanted school to learn about magic. After receiving a book named UBOS (Ultimate Book of Spells) they soon begin their journey of a lifetime

programme.title: UBOS
programme.desc: Cassy, Vern & Gus are gifted students who go to an enchanted school to learn about magic. After receiving a book named UBOS (Ultimate Book of Spells) they soon begin their journey of a lifetime

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Estate agent Brian Carlisle holds an open day at the Catrigg Force waterfall near Ribblesdale, hoping to attract potential buyers to the landmark. Plus, potholing enthusiasts Jude Onions and Johnny Latimer get married at Ingleborough cave, and Adrian Edmondson meets 10-year-old Daisy Watkiss, who hosts a weekly show on community station Drystone Radio

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Adrian Edmondson visits Middleham to meet racehorse trainer Simon West, who hopes to turn around the fortunes of the local stables. The presenter also catches up with farmers Carol and Phillip Mellin, who have embarked on a new venture breeding and training sheepdogs, while villagers in Swaledale hold a remembrance service to commemorate the 60th anniversary of the Hudswell air disaster

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary is summoned to court to answer drink-driving charges resulting from a binge in 1941. A ban looks likely - as does a visit to a counsellor to help save his ailing marriage. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, Dervla Kirwan and Michelle Holmes

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Yvonne and Phoebe invite Gary to dinner on the same evening, and although best friend Ron cautions him against trying to keep both dates, his warnings fall on deaf ears. Nicholas Lyndhurst, Michelle Holmes and Dervla Kirwan star

programme.title: One Good Turn (1954)
programme.desc: A boy living in an orphanage grows up to be the institution's lovable but clumsy caretaker. He must save the children's home from a wicked property developer who wants to build a factory on the site, and tricks him into taking the kids to the seaside so he can knock the building down. Comedy, starring Norman Wisdom and Joan Rice

programme.title: Blackmail (1929)
programme.desc: A woman accidentally kills a would-be attacker in self-defence, and quickly flees the scene - but a sinister figure witnesses the event and attempts to blackmail her. Atmospheric early Hitchcock thriller, starring John Longden, Anny Ondra, Sara Allgood and Charles Paton

programme.title: Trottie True (1949)
programme.desc: A strong-willed showgirl marries into the aristocracy after a fling with a pioneering balloonist - but comes to regret her choice. Period comedy, with Jean Kent and James Donald

programme.title: Taste of Marley
programme.desc: Rohan Marley, son of legendary musician Bob Marley, reconnects with his roots as he goes on a journey to explore the food and music of his native Jamaica

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.desc: Short visual tours of Abbey Wood and Ladywell for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions.
